# Cineby / Bitcine Stream

> Cineby is a modern high-definition streaming platform offering fast, accessible metadata, trailers, and viewing experience for movies and TV series worldwide.

## Core Features
- **Movie Catalogue**: Detailed information, release years, TMDB ratings, cast members, and high-fidelity trailers for thousands of top movies.
- **TV Series Catalogue**: Episode guides, season details, and streaming options for popular series.
- **Browse & Search**: Filter by genres (Action, Sci-Fi, Drama, Comedy, Horror, Animation) or search instantly by title.
- **Watch History & Watchlist**: Local saving for offline-first personal lists.

## Public API Endpoints
- GET `/api/tmdb/movie/:id` - Fetch movie details, credits, and videos.
- GET `/api/tmdb/tv/:id` - Fetch TV show details, credits, and videos.
- GET `/api/tmdb/trending/all/day` - Fetch daily trending movies and TV shows.
- GET `/api/tmdb/search/multi` - Multi-query search for movies and TV series.

## Canonical Domains
- https://cineby.at
- https://cineby.mom
- https://cineplay.online
- https://flixer.ink
- https://bitcine.online
